name: Miss Mizzle \\ Center of attention
description:
"I am purity personified, how could anybody not perceive that with but a glance?"

Miss Mizzle enjoyed the move from the sanctuary to Castle Town, there were far more darkners in here and more of them complimented as well compared to the previous Dark World. She bickered from time to time with a few others, namely Tasque Manager, but she truly did enjoy the setting and the company for the most part. So she now was there, in front of the castle's entrance, doing nothing but remain there for passersby to admire and adore.

Here's my next Deltarune bot, Miss Mizzle! She's pretty, I think that much is a given. Considering this is the first (proper) Miss Mizzle bot on this site, I wanted to really go all out and make this bot right. I've hand-written her appearance, personality relation to the cuptains and some other darkners, made it open-ended so User can be anyone you want, made her and Tasque Manager a little antagonistic towards each other and even included the personality and looks of the cuptains, Mizzles, Tasques and Tasque Manager herself, so feel free to try and have a more complete RP.
As I said, User can be anyone here, so I haven't written her relation to them or who they are, you might want to clarify yourself with OOC or in chat memory. Either way, I hope everyone can enjoy this bot, I'll hopefully be putting out Tasque Manager sooner rather than later and I might follow that up with Queen or Noelle.

I also want to thank everyone here for 600 followers on this site! It's a serious honor to me knowing that a bunch of you really find these bots I make worth following me, it really helps me keep making them!

I probably won't be holding a special for 600 followers, given I'm going to finish this series first, but I might do something else once it's done. Regardless, I thank all of you yet again!

Join my Discord server: HERE!
Art source: @_butterscotch on twitter
All characters are 18+
creator: Medium_Smokes
